Calendars & Key Dates Services Registration Registrar Services Registration Registration Calendar Prior to Registration Registration Details Course Enrollment Policies Visiting Students Service Center Team SIU Course Exchange Students can register for courses through CougarNet . Registration Calendar Please review the recent changes to the registration schedule that have been made in an effort to improve efficiency during high-demand periods. Registration dates are staggered based on student populations. Registration opens at 10 a.m. Central Time on each day. Fall and Spring registration open in the eleventh week of the respective preceding semester. Summer registration opens the Thursday of the week before Fall register. Don't forget to schedule an advising appointment before registering. Check out our video tutorial on how to register through CougarNet for step-by-step guidance. Important Update - New Efficiencies for Summer 2026 Improved Efficiencies for Waitlist Management: If you add yourself to the waitlist for a course, you will get an automated email notification when a seat becomes available. Instructions for claiming your seat will be included in the notification. Upon receiving the email notification, you will need to take action to claim your seat by registering for the course in CougarNet. See the Registrar's FAQ page for more details. Summer 2026 and Fall 2026 Registration Calendar Registration opens at 10 a.m. Central Time. Register for Summer Session first! Thursday, March 26 - Summer registration opens for all students Monday, March 30 - Registration opens for: Seniors (90 Earned Hours or Senior with Degree) Premier Registration groups (ACCESS and Military/ROTC) Tuesday, March 31 - Registration opens for: Early Access groups Graduate and Doctoral Students Thursday, April 2 - Registration opens for: Juniors (60-89 Earned Hours) Monday, April 6 - Registration opens for: Sophomores (30-59 Earned Hours) Thursday, April 9 - Registration opens for: All Students, including Visiting Students A new enhancement has been added within CougarNet that displays key registration and drop dates for each course. For additional information and instructions on accessing this feature, please visit Registration Add and Drop dates . This feature provides students with important academic deadlines, including registration and course drop dates. For a summary of drop deadlines for all courses with varying start and end dates, refer to the calendars below or on this Excel document, Withdrawal Calendars . For further registration details, click the calendars available. General - Full 16 weeks General - First 8 weeks General - Second 8 weeks Nursing - Term 1 Nursing - Term 2 Pharmacy Summer Winter Session Accelerated Online - Term 1 Accelerated Online - Term 2 Â
